title: YouTube Thumbnail YouTube Gaming Stream Despair Scene
sourceTitle: Youtube Thumbnail Youtube Gaming Stream Despair Scene

imagePrompts.prompt: A scene from a popular Japanese YouTuber's {argument name="content" default="game stream"}. In {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"}, it looked like a long bar would clear everything, but the placement was slightly off, and the streamer is screaming with an expression of despair, with the comment section in total chaos. Japanese language.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Japanese language.

imagePrompts.title: Youtube Thumbnail Youtube Gaming Stream Despair Scene

prompt: A scene from a popular Japanese YouTuber's {argument name="content" default="game stream"}. In {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"}, it looked like a long bar would clear everything, but the placement was slightly off, and the streamer is screaming with an expression of despair, with the comment section in total chaos. Japanese language.
originalPrompt: A scene from a popular Japanese YouTuber's {argument name="content" default="game stream"}. In {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"}, it looked like a long bar would clear everything, but the placement was slightly off, and the streamer is screaming with an expression of despair, with the comment section in total chaos. Japanese language.

promptTranslations.zh: 一位受欢迎的日本YouTuber的{argument name="content" default="游戏直播"}场景。在{argument name="game name" default="俄罗斯方块"}中，看起来一个长条可以消除所有方块，但放置位置稍微偏了一点，主播正对着镜头尖叫，表情绝望，评论区一片混乱。日文。
promptTranslations.fr: Une scène tirée du {argument name="content" default="stream de jeu"} d'un YouTubeur japonais populaire. Dans {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"}, tout semblait indiquer qu'une longue barre allait tout effacer, mais le placement était légèrement décalé. Le streamer hurle avec une expression de désespoir, tandis que la section des commentaires est en plein chaos. Langue japonaise.
promptTranslations.ru: Сцена из популярного японского YouTube-стрима {argument name="content" default="игрового стрима"}. В игре {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"} казалось, что длинная фигура сейчас очистит всё поле, но игрок ошибся с размещением, и стример кричит от отчаяния, а чат с комментариями погрузился в полный хаос. Японский язык.
promptTranslations.pt: Uma cena de um YouTuber japonês popular em uma {argument name="content" default="live de jogo"}. Em {argument name="game name" default="Tetris"}, parecia que uma peça longa limparia tudo, mas o posicionamento ficou levemente errado, e o streamer está gritando com uma expressão de desespero, com a seção de comentários em total caos. Idioma japonês.
promptTranslations.ja: 人気日本人YouTuberの{argument name="content" default="ゲーム実況"}のワンシーン。{argument name="game name" default="テトリス"}で、長い棒がすべてを消してくれるかと思いきや、配置がわずかにズレてしまい、絶望の表情で叫ぶ配信者。コメント欄は阿鼻叫喚の嵐。日本語表記。
promptTranslations.ko: 인기 일본 유튜버의 {argument name="content" default="게임 스트리밍"} 장면. {argument name="game name" default="테트리스"}를 하던 중, 긴 막대 블록 하나면 모든 줄이 지워질 것 같았지만 위치가 살짝 어긋나버린 상황. 스트리머는 절망적인 표정으로 비명을 지르고 있고, 채팅창은 완전히 아수라장이 된 모습. 일본어 사용.

authorName: マシモGPT🤖@ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/GrokなどLLMをこねくり回す人
